name: Meeting todo confirmation gate
requiresDatabases: Existing project-local group bindings data source with optional member mapping
requiresEnv: Optional LINE LIFF ID in tenant config
requires: Existing tasks module or compatible tasks data source
publicBaseUrl and publicLinkSecret for signed review links
Optional LINE LIFF ID for stronger host and owner identity checks

dataIsolation.guard: Review sessions bind to the project-local tenant, LINE group binding, meeting page, and tasks data source. AMCore stores only shared code and package documentation; live meetings, candidate todos, formal tasks, group members, LINE IDs, and secrets remain project-local.

changes: Meeting todos are treated as candidates before formal task creation
A signed review page lets the host decide whether todo confirmation is required
Owners can edit and confirm their assigned todos
Changing task title, owner, or due date invalidates the old owner confirmation
Host finalization creates formal tasks only after required fields and owner confirmations pass
If the host does not choose within 24 hours, the system falls back to original direct task creation
definitionOfDone: Meeting record creation still succeeds before any todo confirmation
Formal tasks are not created immediately when the review link is available
The host can skip confirmation and preserve the old workflow
Owner confirmation requires title, owner, and due date
Editing a confirmed todo invalidates only that todo's confirmation
Host finalization is blocked until all todos are ready and owner-confirmed
Created tasks preserve source meeting and group binding where available
